title: Error: pasta failed with exit code 1: netns dir open: Permission denied, exiting
body:
### Issue Description

I'm using fedora-cloud and since the latest update to podman 5.5.0 i get this error when running a fairly simple rootless container:

```
podman --log-level debug  run --name fedora  --rm -it docker.io/fedora:42 sleep 1000
```

Which results in:
```
Error: pasta failed with exit code 1:
netns dir open: Permission denied, exiting
```

run the above command, pasta exits with error

### Describe the results you received

Error: pasta failed with exit code 1:
netns dir open: Permission denied, exiting


The container-image is downloaded, but not started

### Describe the results you expected

Trying the same on my local machine (fedora 42) i have no problems running the container
The only difference could be the slirp4netns entry in 'podman-info'?
